mechanically_supported: 998291 of 1000000 tokens; 20 cycles; clean budget-guard stop; verify_root clean; nomic fingerprinted
46 admitted study-design artifacts; 14 standing; 32 refuted (30 by deterministic program checks, 2 by sustained defended trials); zero anti-relapse blocks
13 conjecturer, 33 variator, 8 synthesizer, 85 critic, 68 defender, 184 judge calls
interpretive_but_reasonable: the synthesizer artifacts perform consolidation by identifying reductions among designs (their claims are censused, not verified)
the court convicted two designs on apparently crisp quantitative or measurability grounds

overstated_corrected.was: zero gate blocks means all 46 were genuinely non-equivalent
overstated_corrected.correction: the repaired anti-relapse gate did not establish that any proposal was a forbidden relapse; admission is not proof of pairwise substantive uniqueness

overstated_corrected.was: 30 refutations killed malformed designs (implying content was tested)
overstated_corrected.correction: program refutations establish malformed or structurally invalid representations only; they say nothing about the mathematical truth of the intended claims

overstated_corrected.was: the court convicts on crisp quantitative claims (implying the rulings verify content)
overstated_corrected.correction: two sustained LLM-court rulings are LLM-judge rulings, not formal proofs; they show the court sustained two objections, nothing more

overstated_corrected.was: the model derived the campaign's conclusion as a theorem / precision-threshold theorem
overstated_corrected.correction: GLM independently generated a quantitative candidate theory that compresses several empirical findings from the criticism campaign and identifies question-conditional critic alignment as the likely missing variable; no claim is a theorem until formalized and verified by executable enumeration, symbolic derivation, or simulation

awaiting_formal_verification: the majority-fragility window (three mutually inconsistent versions censused: upper bounds k/(k+2), k/(k+1), 1/2, plus T13's high-error band above 1/2)
every p_min / precision-threshold formula (T6's realized-ratio form and T7's closed form; T7's precision-as-FPR substitution is unproven and model-dependent until assumptions are explicit)
the identical-aggregates insufficiency meta-claims (T3, T10, T2, T12)

strongest_supported_insight: net value of criticism = wrong majorities repaired - correct majorities broken; criticism-filtered voting helps only when interventions concentrate on fixable wrong-majority questions and stay rare on fragile correct-majority questions. Global precision and recall may be insufficient statistics: two critics with identical aggregates can have opposite effects if their interventions are distributed differently across questions and majority margins. This is the primary hypothesis under executable test.
